{{Infobox artifact
| name = Spirit-seals
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Spirit-seals]] are rectangular sheets of paper with complex [[scripts]] used to weaken [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] suggests the gear [[Yerin]] needs might be a spirit-seal.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] have a stack of forty-eight spirit-seals.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] carries a stack of spirit-seals.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“I’m guessing the gear you need is a spirit-seal?”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
